title: pilea angulata var. stipulosa
intro: Pilea angulata var. stipulosa is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Pilea angulata plant, a member of the Urticaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pilea angulata var. stipulosa include its potential to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions.
